title: Curio Attribute Fantasy
description: That mod adds additional attributes to all mods that add accessories
body:
### This mod does not add any accessories or fields and requires Curios API as a prerequisite.

That Mod adds additional attributes to all mods that add accessories.

Curio Attribute Fantasy will display additional information in the first column of the accessory description.

Since Mods do not add accessories, let's take [Moonstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonstone) as an example here.

![STONE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77e0cfc9fa903b0ec422ae2ee0f16743878b92d1_0.webp)

Press Alt to view the first Basic Curio Attribute, which will display the accessory's attachments.

![EXP2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ed952c5dbb2160fcd6c1e443d5b6b96acb5df11_0.webp)

Curio Attribute Fantasy will randomly give accessories 0-2 attachments.

And this Mod adds dozens of different attachments to the game, so this is just the tip of the iceberg.

![difficulty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80eefb40dc4040e2ede04e3a22d7573b21682ddf_0.webp)

Press Alt to view the second Difficulty Information, which will display the difficulty level of the accessory:

This difficulty level is determined by the world difficulty, and as the difficulty increases, the more basic attributes of the jewelry obtained.

Press Alt to view the third Basic Curio Attribute, which will display the basic attributes of the accessory.

![attributes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69b55c4561b38f5fe8b0941e257ff6a38f749394.png)

At present, these basic attributes include:
- Critical Strike
- Health value
- Armor
- speed
- Excavation speed
- hurt
- treatment

Each value is random (not too high)
